About Donik Sports Academy

Football Training Built Around Every Child

Most football programmes in Lagos are group-focused by necessity. At Donik Sports Academy, our coaches are handpicked and trained to give each child individual attention — because how a seven-year-old develops is nothing like how a fourteen-year-old does.

Five years running programmes in Lagos and Dubai. The results show up in how kids carry themselves, how they respond when things go wrong, and in the players who have gone on to university scholarships and competitive football at higher levels.

We run weekly sessions and our flagship annual Football Summer Camp in partnership with Halifield Schools, Maryland, Lagos — welcoming children aged 5 to 16 of all ability levels.

Get in Touch
Our Teams

The Right Level.
The Right Challenge.

Every child trains in an age and ability group that stretches them without overwhelming them.

Ages 5–8

Foundation

Fun-first sessions that build coordination, confidence, and the basics. Where the love of the game begins.

Ages 9–12

Development

Technique sharpens here. Players build awareness, positioning, and a genuine football brain.

Ages 13–16

Advanced

High-intensity training, tactical depth, and real pathways — including scholarships, tryouts, and scouting.

Every August

Annual Football Summer Camp in Lagos

Our Football Summer Camp at Halifield Schools, Maryland, Lagos runs every August and is one of the most anticipated youth sports events in the city. Spots fill quickly.

If you're considering it for your child, the best time to enquire is now.
